refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall enable achieving the customer-defined productivity target by optimizing equipment operation and task execution efficiency.
refined_fr.rationale: The original FR is broad and outcome-focused; refining it into sub-FRs clarifies specific functional aspects that contribute to productivity, enabling targeted design and verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure productivity metrics (m³/h or ton/h) during representative operations and verify that sub-functions contribute to meeting or exceeding the target.
sub_frs: FR1: Optimize equipment operational parameters to maximize throughput.
FR2: Efficiently schedule and execute worksite tasks to minimize idle time.
FR3: Monitor and report productivity metrics in real-time.

candidate_dps: DP1: Adaptive control algorithms for equipment operation optimization.
DP2: Task scheduling and dispatch system integrated with teleoperation.
DP3: Real-time telemetry and productivity reporting subsystem.
selected_dp.selected_dp: DP1: Adaptive control algorithms for equipment operation optimization.

coupling_check.notes: DP1 logically addresses FR1 with minimal coupling to other DPs; interfaces with telemetry and tasking are well-defined.

assumptions_risks: Assumes availability of accurate sensor data for adaptive control.
Risk that control algorithm complexity may impact real-time responsiveness.
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider modularizing control algorithms to isolate complexity and facilitate testing.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical and embedded control systems responsible for equipment operation and adaptive control.

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Sends operational data and productivity metrics to NGHE Solution and Safety Services.

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receives scheduled tasks and commands from Teleoperation and NGHE Solution.

module_containment_scores.notes: High containment of adaptive control logic within Vehicle; low diffusion as control algorithms are centralized.
Limited containment; mostly coordination and monitoring functions.
No containment of adaptive control logic.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Adaptive control algorithms are best contained within the Vehicle module to ensure tight integration with embedded systems and sensors.
containment_risks: Potential difficulty in updating control algorithms if tightly coupled with embedded hardware.
Risk of insufficient interface definition with Teleoperation for tasking commands.
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface contracts for tasking and telemetry to reduce integration risks.

fr_dp_gate.reason: The selected DP (adaptive control algorithms) directly addresses the refined FR (optimize equipment operation) with clear functional mapping.

diffusion_risks: Low diffusion risk as adaptive control logic is centralized in Vehicle module.
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Containment scores support Vehicle as the appropriate IM boundary for the selected DP.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification can be performed via operational testing of Vehicle control systems and telemetry data analysis.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of adaptive control DP to Vehicle IM with well-defined interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Enhance interface definitions for Teleoperation to Vehicle tasking commands.
Plan for modular updates of control algorithms within Vehicle IM.

decision.justification: While the decomposition and assignments are sound, interface definitions and modularity need refinement to mitigate integration and update risks.
next_level_sub_frs: FR1.1: Adjust equipment parameters based on sensor feedback.
FR1.2: Detect and respond to operational anomalies to maintain productivity.
FR2: Efficiently schedule and execute worksite tasks to minimize idle time.
FR3: Monitor and report productivity metrics in real-time.

revise.why: To improve interface clarity and modularity within the Vehicle module for adaptive control algorithms.

assumptions: Sensor data is reliable and timely for adaptive control.
Vehicle embedded systems can support modular software updates.
open_risks: Integration complexity between Teleoperation and Vehicle tasking interface.
Potential hardware constraints limiting control algorithm flexibility.
evidence_needed: Interface specification documents between Vehicle and Teleoperation.
Test results demonstrating adaptive control responsiveness and productivity impact.
